name: basic-m6502-confluence-macro
description: Atlassian Forge Confluence app and macro for preparing and running 6502-era BASIC.

scripts.build:frontend: node scripts/generate-games-stub-page.mjs && cp ELIZA.BAS static/runner/ELIZA.BAS && esbuild src/frontend/macro.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=static/macro/macro.bundle.js && esbuild src/frontend/runner.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=static/runner/runner.bundle.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/basic-program.js && node --check tests/*.test.js
